_comment_save_server: save_server_host MUST be the save service's Docker network name. It was '127.0.0.1', which inside this container means THIS container, not the save server — every multiplayer login failed with LICENSE_SERVER_UNAVAILABLE as a result. Port 5105 is save_server's internal-only license API (never published to the internet); 5005 is its public client port and no longer answers INTERNAL at all.
_comment_secrets: internal_api_key and admin_password are read from the MICHI_INTERNAL_API_KEY / MICHI_ADMIN_PASSWORD environment variables (see SERVERS/.env.example). Leave them empty here — never commit real secrets.
